name: Optional Fields for XAS data
abstract: Optional XAS metadata extending CDIF mandatory with cdifProvActivity-based provenance. Includes XAS subject descriptors, instrument wrappers, XDI-conformant distribution, measurement technique DefinedTerms, and element/edge keywords. Defines properties: schema:subjectOf, prov:wasGeneratedBy, schema:distribution, schema:measurementTechnique, schema:keywords. Uses building blocks: cdifCore (cdifProperties), cdifProvActivity (cdifProperties), definedTerm (schemaorgProperties), additionalProperty (schemaorgProperties), dataDownload (schemaorgProperties), xasSample (xasProperties), xasSubject (xasProperties).
